name: academia-platform
description: Monorepo para gestao de academias, personal trainers e artes marciais.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @academia/shared && npm run build -w @academia/api && npm run build -w @academia/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @academia/shared && npm run typecheck -w @academia/api && npm run typecheck -w @academia/web && npm run typecheck -w @academia/mobile
